description.zh: 深圳顶级奢华购物中心，国际大牌云集
description.en: Shenzhen's top luxury shopping mall, gathering international brands

zh: 万象城是深圳顶级奢华购物中心，集购物、餐饮、娱乐、休闲于一体的高端商业综合体。
汇聚了LV、GUCCI、Prada等国际顶级奢侈品牌，同时拥有高端餐厅、IMAX影院等休闲娱乐设施。万象城的品牌阵容堪称深圳之最，从一线奢侈品牌到高端设计师品牌，应有尽有。
万象城的餐饮区域也十分丰富，拥有多家米其林星级餐厅和高端特色餐厅，提供各种美食选择。无论是中式美食、西式料理还是日式料理，都能在万象城找到满意的餐厅。
除了购物和餐饮，万象城还拥有IMAX影院、高端超市、美容SPA等休闲娱乐设施。IMAX影院提供震撼的视听体验，高端超市则提供各种进口食品和生活用品，美容SPA则为消费者提供放松身心的服务。
万象城不仅是购物的天堂，更是社交和休闲的场所。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边享受美食和娱乐，度过一个愉快的周末。
万象城的设计也十分精美，采用了现代简约的建筑风格，内部装修豪华大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: The MixC is Shenzhen's top luxury shopping mall, a high-end commercial complex integrating shopping, dining, entertainment and leisure.

It gathers international top luxury brands such as LV, GUCCI, Prada, and also has high-end restaurants, IMAX cinemas and other leisure and entertainment facilities. The brand lineup of The MixC is the best in Shenzhen, from first-line luxury brands to high-end designer brands, everything you can imagine.

The dining area of The MixC is also very rich, with multiple Michelin-starred restaurants and high-end specialty restaurants, providing various food choices. Whether it's Chinese food, Western cuisine or Japanese cuisine, you can find a satisfactory restaurant in The MixC.

In addition to shopping and dining, The MixC also has IMAX cinemas, high-end supermarkets, beauty SPA and other leisure and entertainment facilities. IMAX cinemas provide shocking audio-visual experience, high-end supermarkets provide various imported food and daily necessities, and beauty SPA provides consumers with relaxing services.
The MixC is not only a shopping paradise but also a place for socializing and leisure. Here, consumers can shop while enjoying food and entertainment, spending a pleasant weekend.

The design of The MixC is also very exquisite, adopting a modern and simple architectural style, with luxurious and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

description.zh: 年轻时尚的公园版情景式购物中心
description.en: Young and fashionable park-style scenario shopping center

zh: COCO Park是年轻时尚的公园版情景式购物中心，独特的露天广场设计，汇聚众多时尚品牌和网红餐厅。
拥有ZARA、H&M、UNIQLO等国际快时尚品牌，同时还有各种特色餐饮、酒吧和娱乐设施，是年轻人购物休闲的热门场所。COCO Park的品牌阵容以时尚潮流为主，适合年轻人的购物需求。
COCO Park的餐饮区域也十分丰富，拥有多家网红餐厅和特色小吃店，提供各种美食选择。无论是中式美食、西式料理还是日式料理，都能在COCO Park找到满意的餐厅。
除了购物和餐饮，COCO Park还拥有酒吧街区、露天广场等休闲娱乐设施。酒吧街区提供各种酒水和音乐表演，露天广场则经常举办各种活动和演出，为消费者提供放松身心的服务。
COCO Park不仅是购物的天堂，更是社交和休闲的场所。在这里，年轻人可以一边购物，一边享受美食和娱乐，度过一个愉快的周末。
COCO Park的设计也十分精美，采用了现代简约的建筑风格，内部装修时尚大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: COCO Park is a young and fashionable park-style scenario shopping mall, with a unique open-air plaza design, gathering many fashion brands and popular restaurants.

It has international fast fashion brands such as ZARA, H&M, UNIQLO, as well as various characteristic catering, bars and entertainment facilities, making it a popular place for young people to shop and relax. The brand lineup of COCO Park is mainly fashion trends, suitable for young people's shopping needs.

The dining area of COCO Park is also very rich, with multiple popular restaurants and specialty snack shops, providing various food choices. Whether it's Chinese food, Western cuisine or Japanese cuisine, you can find a satisfactory restaurant in COCO Park.

In addition to shopping and dining, COCO Park also has bar streets, open-air plazas and other leisure and entertainment facilities. Bar streets provide various drinks and music performances, and open-air plazas often hold various activities and performances, providing consumers with relaxing services.
COCO Park is not only a shopping paradise but also a place for socializing and leisure. Here, young people can shop while enjoying food and entertainment, spending a pleasant weekend.

The design of COCO Park is also very exquisite, adopting a modern and simple architectural style, with fashionable and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

description.zh: 中国电子第一街，数码爱好者的天堂
description.en: China's No.1 Electronics Street, paradise for digital enthusiasts

zh: 华强北是中国电子第一街，数码爱好者的天堂，各类电子元器件、数码产品、智能硬件应有尽有。
是中国最大的电子市场，汇聚了手机、电脑、相机等数码产品，以及各种电子元器件、配件和智能设备，价格实惠，种类齐全。华强北的电子市场规模庞大，拥有多个大型电子市场和数万家商户。
华强北的数码产品种类繁多，从最新款的手机、电脑到各种智能硬件和配件，应有尽有。无论是数码爱好者还是普通消费者，都能在华强北找到满意的产品。
除了数码产品，华强北还拥有各种电子元器件和配件，如芯片、电容、电阻、电池等。这些电子元器件和配件是电子工程师和硬件极客的必备之物，价格实惠，种类齐全。
华强北不仅是购物的天堂，更是电子产业的聚集地。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边了解电子产业的最新动态和技术趋势。
华强北的设计也十分独特，采用了现代化的建筑风格，内部装修简洁大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: Huaqiangbei is China's No.1 Electronics Street, paradise for digital enthusiasts, with all kinds of electronic components, digital products, and intelligent hardware available.

It is China's largest electronic market, gathering mobile phones, computers, cameras and other digital products, as well as various electronic components, accessories and smart devices, with affordable prices and complete varieties. Huaqiangbei's electronic market is huge in scale, with multiple large electronic markets and tens of thousands of merchants.

Huaqiangbei has a wide variety of digital products, from the latest mobile phones and computers to various smart hardware and accessories, everything you can imagine. Whether you are a digital enthusiast or an ordinary consumer, you can find satisfactory products in Huaqiangbei.

In addition to digital products, Huaqiangbei also has various electronic components and accessories, such as chips, capacitors, resistors, batteries, etc. These electronic components and accessories are essential for electronic engineers and hardware geeks, with affordable prices and complete varieties.

Huaqiangbei is not only a shopping paradise but also a gathering place for the electronics industry. Here, consumers can shop while learning about the latest trends and technologies in the electronics industry.
The design of Huaqiangbei is also very unique, adopting a modern architectural style, with simple and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

title.zh: 东门老街 | Dongmen Pedestrian Street
title.en: Dongmen Pedestrian Street | 东门老街

description.zh: 深圳最古老的商业街，大众消费首选
description.en: Shenzhen's oldest commercial street, top choice for mass consumption

zh: 东门老街是深圳最古老的商业街，大众消费首选，服装批发、特色小吃、美容美甲，热闹非凡。
这里是深圳最古老的商业街，主要售卖各种时尚服装、鞋子、配饰等，价格亲民，同时还有各种特色小吃和美容美甲店，是年轻人淘宝的好去处。东门老街的历史可以追溯到清朝末年，经过多年的发展，已经成为深圳最具代表性的商业街之一。
东门老街的服装批发区域十分丰富，拥有多家大型服装批发市场和数万家商户。这里的服装款式多样，价格实惠，是年轻人淘宝的好去处。
除了服装批发，东门老街还拥有各种特色小吃和美容美甲店。特色小吃区域汇聚了全国各地的特色小吃，如潮汕牛肉丸、重庆酸辣粉、长沙臭豆腐等，让人垂涎欲滴。美容美甲店则为消费者提供各种美容美甲服务，让消费者在购物的同时也能享受美容美甲的乐趣。
东门老街不仅是购物的天堂，更是深圳历史文化的重要组成部分。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边了解深圳的历史和文化。
东门老街的设计也十分独特，采用了传统与现代相结合的建筑风格，内部装修简洁大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: Dongmen Pedestrian Street is Shenzhen's oldest commercial street, top choice for mass consumption, with clothing wholesale, snacks, beauty services, bustling atmosphere.

This is Shenzhen's oldest commercial street, mainly selling various fashion clothing, shoes, accessories, etc., with affordable prices, and there are also various specialty snacks and beauty nail salons, making it a good place for young people to shop. The history of Dongmen Pedestrian Street can be traced back to the late Qing Dynasty. After years of development, it has become one of Shenzhen's most representative commercial streets.

The clothing wholesale area of Dongmen Pedestrian Street is very rich, with multiple large clothing wholesale markets and tens of thousands of merchants. The clothing here has various styles and affordable prices, making it a good place for young people to shop.

In addition to clothing wholesale, Dongmen Pedestrian Street also has various specialty snacks and beauty nail salons. The specialty snack area gathers specialty snacks from all over the country, such as Chaoshan beef balls, Chongqing hot and sour noodles, Changsha stinky tofu, etc., making people drool. Beauty nail salons provide consumers with various beauty and nail services, allowing consumers to enjoy the fun of beauty and nail while shopping.
Dongmen Pedestrian Street is not only a shopping paradise but also an important part of Shenzhen's history and culture. Here, consumers can shop while learning about Shenzhen's history and culture.

The design of Dongmen Pedestrian Street is also very unique, adopting a combination of traditional and modern architectural style, with simple and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

description.zh: 南山中心区的大型购物中心，毗邻深圳湾
description.en: Large shopping mall in Nanshan center, adjacent to Shenzhen Bay

zh: 海岸城是南山中心区的大型购物中心，毗邻深圳湾，集购物、餐饮、娱乐于一体，拥有大型影院和溜冰场。
汇聚了众多国际时尚品牌和国内知名品牌，如ZARA、H&M、MUJI、优衣库等，同时还有美食广场、IMAX影院、真冰溜冰场等休闲娱乐设施。海岸城的品牌阵容以时尚潮流为主，适合年轻人的购物需求。
海岸城的餐饮区域也十分丰富，拥有多家网红餐厅和特色小吃店，提供各种美食选择。无论是中式美食、西式料理还是日式料理，都能在海岸城找到满意的餐厅。
除了购物和餐饮，海岸城还拥有IMAX影院、真冰溜冰场、儿童乐园等休闲娱乐设施。IMAX影院提供震撼的视听体验，真冰溜冰场则为消费者提供滑冰的乐趣，儿童乐园则为家庭消费者提供亲子娱乐的场所。
海岸城不仅是购物的天堂，更是社交和休闲的场所。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边享受美食和娱乐，度过一个愉快的周末。
海岸城的设计也十分精美，采用了现代简约的建筑风格，内部装修时尚大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: Coastal City is a large shopping mall in Nanshan center, adjacent to Shenzhen Bay, integrating shopping, dining, and entertainment, featuring a large cinema and ice rink.

It gathers many international fashion brands and domestic well-known brands, such as ZARA, H&M, MUJI, Uniqlo, etc., and also has food courts, IMAX cinemas, real ice rinks and other leisure and entertainment facilities. The brand lineup of Coastal City is mainly fashion trends, suitable for young people's shopping needs.

The dining area of Coastal City is also very rich, with multiple popular restaurants and specialty snack shops, providing various food choices. Whether it's Chinese food, Western cuisine or Japanese cuisine, you can find a satisfactory restaurant in Coastal City.

In addition to shopping and dining, Coastal City also has IMAX cinemas, real ice rinks, children's parks and other leisure and entertainment facilities. IMAX cinemas provide shocking audio-visual experience, real ice rinks provide consumers with the fun of skating, and children's parks provide family consumers with parent-child entertainment places.
Coastal City is not only a shopping paradise but also a place for socializing and leisure. Here, consumers can shop while enjoying food and entertainment, spending a pleasant weekend.

The design of Coastal City is also very exquisite, adopting a modern and simple architectural style, with fashionable and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

description.zh: 漫步式城市创作空间，标志性的大象装置
description.en: Strolling urban creative space, iconic elephant installation

zh: 万象天地是漫步式城市创作空间，标志性的大象装置，街区+mall的创新设计，汇聚众多潮流品牌和艺术展览。
拥有Gucci、Balenciaga、Saint Laurent等国际潮流品牌，同时还有艺术画廊、街头艺术装置等文化元素，是年轻人追求潮流和艺术的热门去处。万象天地的品牌阵容以时尚潮流和艺术设计为主，适合年轻人的购物需求。
万象天地的餐饮区域也十分丰富，拥有多家网红餐厅和特色小吃店，提供各种美食选择。无论是中式美食、西式料理还是日式料理，都能在万象天地找到满意的餐厅。
除了购物和餐饮，万象天地还拥有艺术画廊、街头艺术装置、户外演出等文化艺术设施。艺术画廊展示各种当代艺术作品，街头艺术装置则为消费者提供拍照打卡的好去处，户外演出则为消费者提供文化娱乐的场所。
万象天地不仅是购物的天堂，更是艺术和文化的聚集地。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边欣赏艺术和文化，度过一个愉快的周末。
万象天地的设计也十分精美，采用了现代简约的建筑风格，内部装修时尚大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: MixC World is a strolling urban creative space, iconic elephant installation, innovative design of block + mall, gathering many trendy brands and art exhibitions.

It has international trendy brands such as Gucci, Balenciaga, Saint Laurent, and also has cultural elements such as art galleries and street art installations, making it a popular place for young people to pursue trends and art. The brand lineup of MixC World is mainly fashion trends and art design, suitable for young people's shopping needs.

The dining area of MixC World is also very rich, with multiple popular restaurants and specialty snack shops, providing various food choices. Whether it's Chinese food, Western cuisine or Japanese cuisine, you can find a satisfactory restaurant in MixC World.

In addition to shopping and dining, MixC World also has art galleries, street art installations, outdoor performances and other cultural and artistic facilities. Art galleries display various contemporary art works, street art installations provide consumers with good places to take photos, and outdoor performances provide consumers with cultural and entertainment places.
MixC World is not only a shopping paradise but also a gathering place for art and culture. Here, consumers can shop while appreciating art and culture, spending a pleasant weekend.

The design of MixC World is also very exquisite, adopting a modern and simple architectural style, with fashionable and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

description.zh: 深圳单体面积最大的购物中心，前海商业旗舰
description.en: Shenzhen's largest single shopping mall, Qianhai commercial flagship

zh: 壹方城是深圳单体面积最大的购物中心，前海商业旗舰，超大体量，全业态覆盖，家庭亲子与年轻潮流兼顾。
是深圳单体面积最大的购物中心，拥有众多国际品牌和国内知名品牌，如LV、Dior、Nike、Adidas等，同时还有亲子乐园、IMAX影院、美食广场等设施，适合全家一起购物休闲。壹方城的品牌阵容十分丰富，涵盖了奢侈品牌、时尚品牌、运动品牌等多个领域。
壹方城的餐饮区域也十分丰富，拥有多家网红餐厅和特色小吃店，提供各种美食选择。无论是中式美食、西式料理还是日式料理，都能在壹方城找到满意的餐厅。
除了购物和餐饮，壹方城还拥有亲子乐园、IMAX影院、美食广场等休闲娱乐设施。亲子乐园为家庭消费者提供亲子娱乐的场所，IMAX影院提供震撼的视听体验，美食广场则为消费者提供各种美食选择。
壹方城不仅是购物的天堂，更是家庭休闲的好去处。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边享受美食和娱乐，度过一个愉快的周末。
壹方城的设计也十分精美，采用了现代简约的建筑风格，内部装修时尚大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: Uniwalk is Shenzhen's largest single shopping mall, Qianhai commercial flagship, super large scale, full format coverage, suitable for families and young trends.

It is Shenzhen's largest single shopping mall, with many international brands and domestic well-known brands, such as LV, Dior, Nike, Adidas, etc., and also has parent-child parks, IMAX cinemas, food courts and other facilities, suitable for family shopping and leisure. The brand lineup of Uniwalk is very rich, covering luxury brands, fashion brands, sports brands and other fields.

The dining area of Uniwalk is also very rich, with multiple popular restaurants and specialty snack shops, providing various food choices. Whether it's Chinese food, Western cuisine or Japanese cuisine, you can find a satisfactory restaurant in Uniwalk.

In addition to shopping and dining, Uniwalk also has parent-child parks, IMAX cinemas, food courts and other leisure and entertainment facilities. Parent-child parks provide family consumers with parent-child entertainment places, IMAX cinemas provide shocking audio-visual experience, and food courts provide consumers with various food choices.
Uniwalk is not only a shopping paradise but also a good place for family leisure. Here, consumers can shop while enjoying food and entertainment, spending a pleasant weekend.

The design of Uniwalk is also very exquisite, adopting a modern and simple architectural style, with fashionable and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

description.zh: 龙华区的大型商业综合体，打造全新的购物体验
description.en: Large commercial complex in Longhua District, creating a new shopping experience

zh: 壹方天地是龙华区的大型商业综合体，打造全新的购物体验，集购物、餐饮、娱乐、休闲于一体的超大型商业综合体，拥有多个主题区域。
汇聚了ZARA、H&M、优衣库等时尚品牌，以及各种特色餐饮、亲子乐园、电影院等设施，分为A、B、C、D、E五个主题区域，满足不同消费群体的需求。壹方天地的品牌阵容十分丰富，涵盖了时尚品牌、运动品牌、亲子品牌等多个领域。
壹方天地的餐饮区域也十分丰富，拥有多家网红餐厅和特色小吃店，提供各种美食选择。无论是中式美食、西式料理还是日式料理，都能在壹方天地找到满意的餐厅。
除了购物和餐饮，壹方天地还拥有亲子乐园、电影院、健身房等休闲娱乐设施。亲子乐园为家庭消费者提供亲子娱乐的场所，电影院提供震撼的视听体验，健身房则为消费者提供健身的场所。
壹方天地不仅是购物的天堂，更是家庭休闲的好去处。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边享受美食和娱乐，度过一个愉快的周末。
壹方天地的设计也十分精美，采用了现代简约的建筑风格，内部装修时尚大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: Universe Mall is a large commercial complex in Longhua District, creating a new shopping experience, an ultra-large commercial complex integrating shopping, dining, entertainment and leisure, with multiple theme areas.

It gathers fashion brands such as ZARA, H&M, Uniqlo, as well as various specialty catering, parent-child parks, cinemas and other facilities, divided into five theme areas A, B, C, D and E to meet the needs of different consumer groups. The brand lineup of Universe Mall is very rich, covering fashion brands, sports brands, parent-child brands and other fields.

The dining area of Universe Mall is also very rich, with multiple popular restaurants and specialty snack shops, providing various food choices. Whether it's Chinese food, Western cuisine or Japanese cuisine, you can find a satisfactory restaurant in Universe Mall.

In addition to shopping and dining, Universe Mall also has parent-child parks, cinemas, gyms and other leisure and entertainment facilities. Parent-child parks provide family consumers with parent-child entertainment places, cinemas provide shocking audio-visual experience, and gyms provide consumers with fitness places.
Universe Mall is not only a shopping paradise but also a good place for family leisure. Here, consumers can shop while enjoying food and entertainment, spending a pleasant weekend.

The design of Universe Mall is also very exquisite, adopting a modern and simple architectural style, with fashionable and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.

title.zh: 万象城二期 | The MixC Phase 2
title.en: The MixC Phase 2 | 万象城二期

description.zh: 南山万象城的扩建项目，打造更奢华的购物体验
description.en: Expansion project of Nanshan The MixC, creating a more luxurious shopping experience

zh: 万象城二期是南山万象城的扩建项目，打造更奢华的购物体验，延续了一期的奢华定位，引入更多国际顶级品牌，提供更丰富的购物和休闲体验。
新增了Chanel、Hermès、Cartier等国际顶级奢侈品牌，同时扩大了餐饮和娱乐区域，拥有更多高端餐厅和精品店，为消费者提供更加奢华的购物体验。万象城二期的品牌阵容更加豪华，涵盖了更多国际顶级奢侈品牌。
万象城二期的餐饮区域也十分丰富，拥有多家米其林星级餐厅和高端特色餐厅，提供各种美食选择。无论是中式美食、西式料理还是日式料理，都能在万象城二期找到满意的餐厅。
除了购物和餐饮，万象城二期还拥有IMAX影院、高端超市、美容SPA等休闲娱乐设施。IMAX影院提供震撼的视听体验，高端超市则提供各种进口食品和生活用品，美容SPA则为消费者提供放松身心的服务。
万象城二期不仅是购物的天堂，更是社交和休闲的场所。在这里，消费者可以一边购物，一边享受美食和娱乐，度过一个愉快的周末。
万象城二期的设计也十分精美，采用了现代简约的建筑风格，内部装修豪华大气，为消费者提供舒适的购物环境。
en: The MixC Phase 2 is an expansion project of Nanshan The MixC, creating a more luxurious shopping experience, continuing the luxury positioning of Phase 1, introducing more international top brands and providing a richer shopping and leisure experience.

It has added international top luxury brands such as Chanel, Hermès, Cartier, while expanding the dining and entertainment area, with more high-end restaurants and boutiques, providing consumers with a more luxurious shopping experience. The brand lineup of The MixC Phase 2 is more luxurious, covering more international top luxury brands.

The dining area of The MixC Phase 2 is also very rich, with multiple Michelin-starred restaurants and high-end specialty restaurants, providing various food choices. Whether it's Chinese food, Western cuisine or Japanese cuisine, you can find a satisfactory restaurant in The MixC Phase 2.

In addition to shopping and dining, The MixC Phase 2 also has IMAX cinemas, high-end supermarkets, beauty SPA and other leisure and entertainment facilities. IMAX cinemas provide shocking audio-visual experience, high-end supermarkets provide various imported food and daily necessities, and beauty SPA provides consumers with relaxing services.
The MixC Phase 2 is not only a shopping paradise but also a place for socializing and leisure. Here, consumers can shop while enjoying food and entertainment, spending a pleasant weekend.

The design of The MixC Phase 2 is also very exquisite, adopting a modern and simple architectural style, with luxurious and grand interior decoration, providing consumers with a comfortable shopping environment.
